title: Login service returning 503 — customer authentication broken
summary: Login service returning 503 — customer authentication broken
description: Users cannot authenticate. Auth service returning 503 errors. Possibly database connection pool exhaustion. Customer-facing P1.
raw_text: Login service returning 503 — customer authentication broken. Users cannot authenticate. Auth service returning 503 errors.

title: Fix login page validation error
description: Users reporting that the login page shows a generic error instead of field-specific validation messages. Need to update error handling in the auth component.
raw_text: Users reporting that the login page shows a generic error instead of field-specific validation messages.

title: API rate limiting for external integrations
description: Implement token bucket rate limiting for all external API integrations to prevent 429 errors during peak usage.
raw_text: Implement token bucket rate limiting for all external API integrations.

title: Upgrade PostgreSQL connection pool
description: The current connection pool size (10) is insufficient during peak load. Increase to 25 and add connection retry logic with exponential backoff.
raw_text: Increase connection pool size from 10 to 25 and add retry logic.

title: Dark mode toggle for dashboard
description: Implement a dark mode toggle in the dashboard settings. Store preference in localStorage and apply CSS variables.
raw_text: Implement a dark mode toggle in the dashboard settings.

title: E2E tests for checkout flow
description: Write end-to-end tests covering the complete checkout flow: add to cart, payment, confirmation, and edge cases.
raw_text: Write end-to-end tests for the checkout flow.

title: WebSocket keepalive heartbeat
description: Add a ping/pong heartbeat mechanism to the WebSocket connection to prevent idle timeouts after 5 minutes.
raw_text: Add ping/pong heartbeat mechanism to WebSocket connection.

title: Stakeholder demo dashboard prep
description: Prepare the live metrics dashboard for the Friday stakeholder demo. Ensure all charts have real data and real-time updates work.
raw_text: Prepare the live metrics dashboard for the Friday stakeholder demo.

title: Memory profiler integration
description: Add memory profiling to the sync engine to track the suspected memory leak. Use tracemalloc to identify uncollected objects.
raw_text: Add memory profiling to the sync engine using tracemalloc.

title: Update API documentation
description: Update the OpenAPI/Swagger documentation to reflect the new endpoints added this sprint: /api/sync, /api/metrics, /api/weekly-summary.
raw_text: Update OpenAPI documentation for new endpoints.

title: Fix duplicate task detection
description: The deduplication logic is not catching duplicates when titles differ by punctuation. Add punctuation-normalized comparison.
raw_text: Fix deduplication logic to catch punctuation-different duplicates.
